title: jasminum angustifolium var. sessiliflorum
intro: Jasminum angustifolium var. sessiliflorum, also known as the Sessile-Flowered Jasmine, is a flowering plant species within the Jasminum genus. The medicinal properties of this plant include its ability to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities, which may contribute to its potential health benefits. Consuming this plant in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions may help alleviate digestive issues and reduce symptoms of anxiety and stress due to its calming effects. However, the herbal preparations and potential health benefits of Jasminum angustifolium var. sessiliflorum require further research to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
